<?php namespace Spatie\Html\Helpers; use Illuminate\Support\Collection; class Arr { /** * Return an array of enabled values. Enabled values are either: * - Keys that have a truthy value; * - Values that don't have keys. * * Example: * * Arr::getToggledValues(['foo' => true, 'bar' => false, 'baz']) * // => ['foo', 'baz'] * * @param mixed $map * * @return array */ public static function getToggledValues($map) { return Collection::make($map)->map(function ($condition, $value) { if (is_numeric($value)) { return $condition; } return $condition ? $value : null; })->filter()->toArray(); } }
